issues: The dossier describes a real Bollywood actor, Aamir Khan (born March 14, 1965), with his real filmography (QSQT, PK, TZP, Dangal, Laal Singh Chaddha), real family members (father Tahir Hussain, uncle Nasir Hussain, ex-wives Reena Dutta and Kiran Rao, son Junaid Khan, cousin Imran Khan), and real-life events (hosting Satyamev Jayate, public apology for Laal Singh Chaddha). No such character exists in Marvel Comics canon.
aamir_khan.who_it_should_be: A Marvel Comics character, not a real person.
